title: juncus glaucus subsp. diffusus
intro: Juncus glaucus subsp. diffusus, also known as common rush, is a plant species belonging to the Juncaceae family, characterized by its tall, slender stems and grass-like appearance. The medicinal properties of Juncus glaucus subsp. diffusus include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic acids, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Juncus glaucus subsp. diffusus can be prepared as an infusion, tea, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies for its expectorant properties to relieve respiratory issues.
